{{Infobox location
| name = Life Well
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Life Well is a rare and highly valuable liquid produced as an unintended byproduct of industrial work within a specific habitat. Housed in an iron-gray building comparable to the size of a large barn, the facility contains a vessel that resembles a laundry tub and emits a bright [[emerald]] glow. The substance itself is described as having a flavor similar to weak tea. Its primary function is to strengthen an individual's internal [[life]] [[aura]], which can provide significant healing and even restore youth to elderly people. While it is capable of restoring a person's lifeline to a healthy state, the liquid can be dangerous for older subjects; in a small number of instances, consumption has resulted in death or comas. Due to its potency and scarcity, it is considered one of the most expensive waters available, often distributed in very small amounts such as single spoonfuls or vials.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Located near the [[Blackflame Empire]] delegation, the Life Well is a specialized facility capable of bolstering a line of [[life]] [[aura]] and restoring youth. While [[Lindon]] sat against the structure, [[Orthos]] consumed liquid from the well. Following these events, [[Dross]] managed to retain a single vial taken from the site.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Life Well]] is a facility that bolsters the line of [[life]] [[aura]] and can restore youth.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] sits against the [[Life Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] drinks from the [[Life Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Life Well]] is a location near the [[Blackflame Empire]] delegation.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] kept one vial from the [[Life Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Life Well]] can heal a damaged lifeline.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
